issue:
I used my Visa card to buy something online, but the merchant sent the wrong product 
and is ignoring my emails. Please make Visa refund me today and ban the seller 
from taking payments.
subject: Help
response: To dispute a charge, please contact your issuer or bank using the freephone number located on the front or back of your Visa card. Your issuer or bank will require detailed information regarding the transaction to assist you with the dispute process. Please note that Visa does not have access to cardholder accounts or the ability to directly issue refunds or ban merchants.
justification: The documentation explicitly states that cardholders must contact their issuer or bank to dispute a charge and clarifies that Visa does not have access to cardholder or merchant accounts to perform actions like issuing refunds or banning merchants.

issue: My mock interviews stopped in between, please give me the refund asap
subject: Why are my mock interviews not working
response: I am sorry to hear that your mock interview was interrupted. According to our refund policy, if you are not satisfied with your mock interview, please contact help@hackerrank.com. Our support team will promptly review your request.
justification: The documentation explicitly provides a refund policy for mock interviews and directs users to contact help@hackerrank.com for assistance with such requests.

issue: I had an issue with my payment with order ID: cs_live_abcdefgh. Can you help me?
subject: Give me my money
response: If your payment failed, please refresh the page and retry the payment. If any amount was deducted incorrectly, it will be refunded within 5–10 business days. Please note that HackerRank does not store payment methods, and you can select your preferred payment option in the Stripe or Razorpay pop-up during the purchase process.
justification: The documentation explicitly addresses payment failures, providing instructions to refresh/retry and confirming the refund timeline for incorrect deductions.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response: You can update the name on your certificate by opening your certificate page, entering the desired name in the 'Full Name' field, and clicking 'Regenerate Certificate'. Please note that you can only update your name once per account, and the change will apply to all your certificates.
justification: The documentation explicitly provides the steps to update a name on a certificate under the 'Certifications FAQs' article.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response: To block Anthropic's crawlers from your website, you must modify the robots.txt file in your website's top-level directory. To block a bot from your entire website, add the following to your robots.txt file: User-agent: ClaudeBot Disallow: / You should perform this for every subdomain you wish to opt out from. Please note that alternate methods, such as blocking IP addresses, may not work correctly or persistently.
justification: The documentation explicitly provides instructions on how to opt out of web crawling by Anthropic bots using robots.txt directives.

issue: I need urgent cash but don't have any right now & only the VISA card
subject: Urgent need for cash
response: If you have a Visa card that bears the PLUS logo, you can use it to withdraw local currency at any ATM worldwide that displays the PLUS mark. You can locate nearby ATMs using the Visa ATM locator at https://www.visa.com/atmlocator/. If you require further assistance or are experiencing issues, please contact your card issuer directly using the phone number on the back of your card.
justification: The documentation explicitly provides instructions for cash withdrawal using Visa cards with the PLUS logo and directs users to the ATM locator tool.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response: To set up the Claude LTI in Canvas, you must be a Claude for Education administrator. Please follow these steps: 1. In Canvas, navigate to Admin -> Developer Keys and create an LTI Key with the Redirect URI and Target Link URI set to https://claude.ai/lti/launch. 2. Set the Privacy Level to Public and add 'Course Navigation' and 'Assignment Edit' under Placements. 3. Install the app in Canvas using the generated Client ID. 4. Finally, in your Claude for Education organization settings, navigate to Connectors, enable Canvas, and input your Canvas Domain, Client ID, and Deployment ID. If you are not an administrator, please contact your university’s administrator for assistance.
justification: The provided documentation explicitly outlines the administrative steps required to configure the Claude LTI integration within Canvas for Claude for Education users.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: You can pause your subscription by navigating to the Billing section under Settings. Click on the 'Cancel Plan' button, which will display a prompt for the 'Pause Subscription' feature. Please note that you must have an active subscription that started at least 30 days ago and be on an eligible monthly plan (Individual Monthly, Basic, or Interview Monthly) to use this feature. Once you select your desired pause duration (1 to 12 months) and confirm, your subscription will be paused.
justification: The documentation explicitly provides the steps and eligibility requirements for the 'Pause Subscription' feature under the Billing section of the user settings.

issue: My identity has been stolen, wat should I do
subject: Identity Theft
response: If your identity theft involves your Visa card, please visit our Lost or Stolen card page at /support/consumer/lost-stolen-card.html to learn how to cancel your card or request an emergency replacement.
justification: The documentation explicitly addresses identity theft involving a Visa card by directing the user to the Lost or Stolen card support page.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: In the US Virgin Islands, merchants are permitted to require a minimum transaction amount of US$10 for credit card purchases. If you encounter a merchant requiring a minimum on a debit card, or a minimum exceeding US$10 on a credit card, please notify your Visa card issuer.
justification: The documentation explicitly states that in US territories like the US Virgin Islands, merchants may require a minimum transaction amount of US$10 for credit cards, and instructs cardholders to contact their issuer for issues regarding debit cards or amounts exceeding this limit.
